# Code Review Standards

## Review Dimensions

- **Architecture**: Adheres to project patterns; proper layer separation; consistent with design decisions
- **Security**: No vulnerabilities; input validation; secure data handling; authentication/authorization checks
- **Performance**: No unnecessary loops/queries; appropriate algorithms; caching where relevant; memory efficient
- **Readability**: Clear variable names; sufficient comments for complex logic; consistent style; self-documenting code
- **Maintainability**: DRY principle; testable code; single responsibility; minimal coupling; future-proof design

## Standards

✓ All tests passing
✓ No security vulnerabilities
✓ Follows project conventions
✓ Performance impact documented
✓ Breaking changes noted
✓ Backward compatibility verified
